executives.name: Morgan Lekstrom
executives.background: Mr. Lekstrom has 17 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive roles at Silver Hammer Mining Corp. and Kuya Silver Corp. He has a background in project management and operations, having worked with Freeport McMoran and Rio Tinto.

executives.name: Jeremy Brett
executives.background: Mr. Brett is a Professional Geoscientist with over 25 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He has consulted for over 100 companies globally and specializes in project management and technical due diligence.

executives.name: Galen McNamara
executives.background: Mr. McNamara is an entrepreneur and geoscientist with over 15 years of experience. He is the co-founder and CEO of Summa Silver Corp. and was previously the Senior Project Geologist at NexGen Energy Ltd.

executives.name: Brandon Macdonald
executives.background: Mr. Macdonald is a professional geologist and the CEO of Fireweed Metals Corp. He has extensive experience in capital markets and mineral exploration.

board_of_directors.name: Galen McNamara
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McNamara is an entrepreneur and geoscientist with over 15 years of experience. He is the co-founder and CEO of Summa Silver Corp. and was previously the Senior Project Geologist at NexGen Energy Ltd.
